tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2045552-f5f5b59f785e4291bce14124428e32ff/calc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573541250 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2045552-f5f5b59f785e4291bce14124428e32ff/calc.py	2026-06-15 11:52:12.575991632 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    return a - b
+    return a + b
